title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
